title.en: Vinicius Jr stops fun and leaves Scots down... but are they out?
title.zh-CN: Vinicius Jr停止娱乐，让苏格兰人失望……但他们出去了吗？

summary.en: Scotland's party stops at the hands of Brazil in Miami, but might they still find themselves in the last 32?
summary.zh-CN: 苏格兰的派对在迈阿密停在巴西的手中，但他们是否仍然会在过去的32年里发现自己？

title.en: 'Think we're going home' - Clarke & McGinn rue Scotland mistakes
title.zh-CN: “认为我们要回家了” - Clarke和McGinn rue苏格兰的错误

summary.en: Scotland will have to wait until potentially the early hours of Sunday to find out if their World Cup campaign will continue, but midfielder John McGinn suspects that is "unlikely" and head coach...
summary.zh-CN: 苏格兰将不得不等到周日凌晨才能确定他们的世界杯战役是否会继续，但中场球员约翰·麦金（ John McGinn ）怀疑这是“不太可能的” ，主教练......

title.en: Scotland hopes on the brink following defeat against Brazil
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰希望在击败巴西后处于边缘

summary.en: Scotland's hopes of reaching the knockout stages of the World Cup for the first time are in significant peril with calamitous defending allowed Brazil to win 3-0 in Miami and finish top of Group C.
summary.zh-CN: 苏格兰希望首次进入世界杯的淘汰赛阶段，但由于灾难性的防守，巴西队在迈阿密以3比0获胜，并获得了C组的冠军。

title.en: What do Scotland need to make World Cup knockouts?
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰需要什么才能淘汰世界杯？

summary.en: After their 3-0 defeat by Brazil, BBC Sport looks at what Scotland require to reach the knockout phase.
summary.zh-CN: 在3-0击败巴西之后，英国广播公司体育台着眼于苏格兰达到淘汰赛阶段所需的条件。

title.en: 'Mixed emotions' as Canada qualify but lose home advantage
title.zh-CN: 加拿大合格但失去主场优势的“复杂情绪”

summary.en: Losing their final group game to Switzerland means co-hosts Canada will play no further matches in their home country at this year's World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 最后一场小组赛输给了瑞士，这意味着合作主办方加拿大将不再在本国参加今年的世界杯比赛。

title.en: What each team need to reach World Cup knockouts
title.zh-CN: 每支球队进入世界杯淘汰赛所需的条件

summary.en: With the final round of group fixtures under way the path to the World Cup final on 19 July is starting to take shape.
summary.zh-CN: 随着最后一轮小组赛的举行，通往7月19日世界杯决赛的道路开始成形。

title.en: Morocco progress after victory over Haiti
title.zh-CN: 摩洛哥战胜海地后取得进展

summary.en: Soufiane Rahimi and Gessime Yassine score late goals for Morocco to deny Haiti their first-ever World Cup point in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 苏菲安娜·拉希米（ Soufiane Rahimi ）和盖西梅·亚辛（ Gessime Yassine ）为摩洛哥进球较晚，否认海地在亚特兰大首次获得世界杯积分。

title.en: South Africa into round of 32 after win over South Korea
title.zh-CN: 南非在战胜韩国后进入32强

summary.en: Thapelo Maseko's second-half goal gives South Africa a 1-0 win over South Korea in Monterrey, and sends them into the World Cup knockout phase.
summary.zh-CN: 塔佩洛·马塞科（ Thapelo Maseko ）的下半场进球让南非在蒙特雷以1比0战胜韩国，并将他们送入世界杯淘汰赛阶段。

title.en: Mexico beat Czech Republic to maintain 100% winning record
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥击败捷克共和国，保持100%的胜利纪录

summary.en: Mexico score three second-half goals to eliminate the Czech Republic from the World Cup and end the group phase with maximum points.
summary.zh-CN: 墨西哥队打进三个下半场进球，将捷克共和国淘汰出世界杯，并以最高分结束小组赛阶段。

title.en: 'Typical Scotland': Tartan Army give their verdict on Miami match against Brazil
title.zh-CN: “典型的苏格兰” ： Tartan军队对迈阿密对巴西的比赛做出判决

summary.en: Scotland's hopes of reaching the knockout stages of the World Cup are in peril after Brazil won 3-0 in Miami.
summary.zh-CN: 在巴西以3比0战胜迈阿密之后，苏格兰进入世界杯淘汰赛阶段的希望岌岌可危。

title.en: Scotland face anxious wait after punishing loss to Brazil
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰在惩罚输给巴西后面临焦虑等待

summary.en: Scotland face a nervous wait to learn their World Cup fate after they were punished by Brazil.
summary.zh-CN: 在被巴西惩罚后，苏格兰面临着了解世界杯命运的紧张等待。

title.en: Clarke downbeat on Scotland's knockout round hopes: 'I think we're going home'
title.zh-CN: 克拉克对苏格兰淘汰赛的希望感到悲观： “我认为我们要回家了”

summary.en: Steve Clarke believes Scotland are "going home" after a damaging 3-0 defeat to Brazil in their final Group C game of the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 史蒂夫·克拉克（ Steve Clarke ）认为，苏格兰在2026年世界杯的最后一场C组比赛中以3比0击败巴西后，正在“回家”。

title.en: Ochoa and Mora make World Cup history as Mexico down Czech Republic
title.zh-CN: 奥乔亚（ Ochoa ）和莫拉（ Mora ）在墨西哥击败捷克共和国

summary.en: Guillermo Ochoa appeared at a record sixth World Cup and 17-year-old Gilberto Mora shone as the youngest player to start in the competition for 24 years as co-hosts Mexico eliminated Czech Republic...
summary.zh-CN: 吉列尔莫·奥乔亚（ Guillermo Ochoa ）出现在创纪录的第六届世界杯上， 17岁的吉尔贝托·莫拉（ Gilberto Mora ）成为24年来最年轻的首发球员，因为共同主办国墨西哥淘汰了捷克共和国......

title.en: South Africa make history by qualifying with win over South Korea
title.zh-CN: 南非凭借战胜韩国的资格赛创造历史

summary.en: South Africa have reached the World Cup knockout rounds for the first time in their history by finishing second in Group A with a 1-0 victory over South Korea.
summary.zh-CN: 南非历史上首次进入世界杯淘汰赛，以1比0战胜韩国，在A组中获得第二名。

title.en: Morocco late show beats Haiti and secures second in Group C
title.zh-CN: 摩洛哥晚秀击败海地，在C组中获得第二名

summary.en: Two late goals earned Morocco a hard-fought 4-2 win against Haiti in their final Group C game, which saw them finish as runners-up.
summary.zh-CN: 摩洛哥队在最后一场C组比赛中以4比2战胜了海地队，他们最终获得了亚军。

title.en: Scotland’s World Cup dream hanging by a thread after Vinícius sparks Brazil victory

summary.en: Scotland will now play the waiting game. The trouble is, as they hang around to discover whether a place in the last 32 can be secured as among the leading eight third placed teams in this World Cup,...

title.en: Maseko strike sends South Africa into first World Cup knockouts with win over South Korea

summary.en: South ​Africa celebrated a first World Cup knockout berth with jubilant scenes on Wednesday after Thapelo Maseko’s second-half strike secured a 1-0 victory over South ⁠Korea, who still have a chance...

title.en: Morocco battle back to claim thumping World Cup win in six-goal thriller with Haiti

summary.en: Morocco confirmed their progress to the World Cup last 32 ⁠but twice had to ⁠come from behind to ​get the better of plucky Haiti 4-2 in an action-packed game on Wednesday, and fell short of topping...

title.en: 'A phenomenal goal!' Isidor hits incredible strike for Haiti

summary.en: Wilson Isidor gives Haiti a lead against Morocco with an "extraordinary" World Cup goal at the Atlanta Stadium.

title.en: Belgium going out? Sutton's World Cup 2026 score predictions - final group games

summary.en: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the scores of the final set of group games at the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: Brighton in advanced talks to sign Walti

summary.en: Brighton are in advanced talks to sign Juventus and Switzerland midfielder Lia Walti.

title.en: Bosnia boost last-32 hopes after win over Qatar

summary.en: Bosnia-Herzegovina boost their hopes of reaching the knockout stages in the World Cup for a first ever time defeating Qatar in their final Group B fixture.

title.en: Switzerland beat Canada but both through to last 32

summary.en: Switzerland seal their place in the first knockout round of the World Cup by beating co-hosts Canada to top Group B.

title.en: David scores with first touch for Canada

summary.en: Canada forward Promise David scores with his first touch to give his side hope in their Group B match against Switzerland in Vancouver.

title.en: 'What a moment!' Alajbegovic scores stunning opener for Bosnia

summary.en: 18-year-old winger Kerim Alajbegovic scores a superb opening goal for Bosnia in their World Cup Group B match against Qatar in Seattle.

title.en: Villa fans get suspended ban for discriminatory behaviour

summary.en: Aston Villa could be banned from selling tickets for a European away game next season following an incident at the Europa League final.

title.en: Switzerland fight off late Canada barrage to claim Group B top spot

summary.en: Switzerland claimed top spot in Group B after silencing the home fans in Vancouver with a 2-1 win over Canada.
